center.name: 巴塔哥尼亞
center.summary: 巴塔哥尼亞是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联10种鸟类，包括小美洲鸵、Silvery grebe、阿根廷鸊鷉等10种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species is found in South America, breeding from Argentine and Chilean Patagonia, the Falkland Islands and Uruguay

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This bird is endemic to eastern and central South America, where it is present in southern and central Brazil, Bolivia, Paraguay and in Argentina south to northern Patagonia. The status of the Chaco Eagle is uncertain in Uruguay, where it has not been seen for decades and is believed to be extinct. It has become regionally extinct in portions of its historical range, and is found in very low density throughout its range, making it one of the rarest and most threatened raptors in the Neotropical region. Only 250-999 mature individuals are left, while the total individual count of the species reaches 375-1499 birds

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Further south it mostly breeds above but can be found in summer below in Chilean Patagonia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Patagonia and Tierra del Fuego in southern Argentina and Chile

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Patagonia, it sometimes inhabits saline lakes where it can be found in the company of flamingoes

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-backed race inhabits the widest range of areas of the variable hawk races, including above tree line in mountains, Pacific coastal foothills, Patagonian steppes, agricultural areas and edges of river galleries, beech woods and humid premontane and lowland forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Its population size and trend have remained stable, and the bird is not endangered as they are considered Least Concern with no current threats to their species. Its migration patterns are largely resident and they migrate to west-central Argentina, and on the Atlantic coast of Patagonia. Their exact population size is unknown but is around under 10,000

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Altiplano and Patagonia in South America

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in Chile and Patagonia, migrating north as far as Bolivia, Paraguay, and Rio Grande do Sul

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in isolated lakes in the most remote parts of Patagonia and spends winters along the coast of the same region
